Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-01 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
AGX ranks #1 today with an exceptionally strong momentum score of 96.6, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,980.8% over 10 years and 1,300.6% over 5 years, significantly outpacing SPY by 1,735.9% and 1,228.1% respectively over those periods. The ticker shows clean momentum signals with all four moving average tests passing and a "strong_buy" flag, though its thin volatility (vol_ratio of 0.737) suggests relatively low trading volume. CASY ranks #2 with much more modest but still solid performance—658.2% over 10 years and 274.6% over 5 years—and maintains the same technical strength with all SMAs positive and a negative bad_spy_score of -0.180, indicating better alignment with long-term trends. The gap between these two leaders is striking: AGX's 5-year return is nearly 5x larger than CASY's, suggesting the momentum ranker is currently highlighting a far more exceptional outlier in the 700+ ticker universe.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
